title: Any Lanterns!
description: Add more lanterns with special models for decoration in vanilla style.
body:
**Any Lanterns!**  
The mod adds new lanterns with special models and small interesting features.  
More lights and integrations with other mods will be added in the future.  
![](https://i.gyazo.com/090f107a9769499def44e2b532823e94.png)![](https://i.gyazo.com/ebb7b971673d6833ca28631a0b850dd3.png)  
![](https://i.gyazo.com/090f107a9769499def44e2b532823e94.png)  
  
  

Take part in creating a mod! You can add your lantern to the mod. Join the discord to send your lantern and receive a template.

 Also submit your buildings with the mod and they will be added to the mod gallery.

![](https://i.gyazo.com/0b66ce3133c9dbcf77fbd8bb3e9a7176.png)
